flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at CUNY LaGuardia Community College rose 23% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.0k → $7.4k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at CUNY LaGuardia Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.2% → 0.0%).
